Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8791 "COSMICCRUISER-8791" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Cosmic Cruiser.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Patched the LDA #$00 instruction at $1064 to be LDA #$E9 to significantly reduce the wait on the Imagine splash screen.
